summary: BYD surpassed Tesla in global EV sales. Rivian preparing R3/R3X (all under $50K) — biggest near-term US threat. Lucid targeting Model S/X customers. Ford/GM scaling back EV programs. In robotics: Unitree, Boston Dynamics, Agility Robotics, Apptronik competing with Optimus.
